# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

properties([
    parameters([
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No build command specified"', description: 'Custom build command to execute'),
        string(name: 'TEST_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No test command specified"', description: 'Custom test command to execute'),
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No deployment command specified"', description: 'Custom deployment command to execute'),
        text(name: 'PRE_BUILD_SCRIPTS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Multi-line pre-build scripts (one per line)'),
        text(name: 'POST_BUILD_SCRIPTS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Multi-line post-build scripts (one per line)'),
        text(name: 'PRE_TEST_SCRIPTS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Multi-line pre-test scripts (one per line)'),
        text(name: 'POST_TEST_SCRIPTS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Multi-line post-test scripts (one per line)'),
        text(name: 'PRE_DEPLOYMENT_SCRIPTS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Multi-line pre-deployment scripts (one per line)'),
        text(name: 'POST_DEPLOYMENT_SCRIPTS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Multi-line post-deployment scripts (one per line)'),
        string(name: 'WORKING_DIRECTORY', defaultValue: '.', description: 'Working directory for commands'),
        string(name: 'BUILD_TIMEOUT', defaultValue: '30', description: 'Build timeout in minutes'),
        string(name: 'TEST_TIMEOUT', defaultValue: '30', description: 'Test timeout in minutes'),
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_TIMEOUT', defaultValue: '30', description: 'Deployment timeout in minutes'),
        choice(name: 'SHELL_TYPE', choices: ['bash', 'sh', 'zsh'], description: 'Shell interpreter to use'),
        booleanParam(name: 'SKIP_BUILD', defaultValue: false, description: 'Skip build stage'),
        booleanParam(name: 'SKIP_TEST', defaultValue: false, description: 'Skip test stage'),
        booleanParam(name: 'SKIP_DEPLOYMENT', defaultValue: false, description: 'Skip deployment stage'),
        booleanParam(name: 'CONTINUE_ON_BUILD_FAILURE', defaultValue: false, description: 'Continue pipeline even if build fails'),
        booleanParam(name: 'CONTINUE_ON_TEST_FAILURE', defaultValue: false, description: 'Continue pipeline even if tests fail'),
        booleanParam(name: 'VERBOSE_OUTPUT', defaultValue: true, description: 'Enable verbose output'),
        string(name: 'ENVIRONMENT_VARS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Additional environment variables (KEY1=VALUE1,KEY2=VALUE2)'),
        text(name: 'CUSTOM_STAGE_1_NAME', defaultValue: '', description: 'Custom stage 1 name'),
        text(name: 'CUSTOM_STAGE_1_COMMANDS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Custom stage 1 commands (one per line)'),
        text(name: 'CUSTOM_STAGE_2_NAME', defaultValue: '', description: 'Custom stage 2 name'),
        text(name: 'CUSTOM_STAGE_2_COMMANDS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Custom stage 2 commands (one per line)'),
        text(name: 'CUSTOM_STAGE_3_NAME', defaultValue: '', description: 'Custom stage 3 name'),
        text(name: 'CUSTOM_STAGE_3_COMMANDS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Custom stage 3 commands (one per line)'),
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_PATHS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Paths to archive as artifacts (comma-separated)'),
        string(name: 'NOTIFICATION_EMAIL', defaultValue: '', description: 'Email for build notifications'),
        booleanParam(name: 'CLEANUP_WORKSPACE', defaultValue: false, description: 'Clean workspace after build')
    ])
])

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    environment {
        SHELL_INTERPRETER = "${params.SHELL_TYPE}"
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Initialize') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Pipeline Configuration ==="
                    echo "Working Directory: ${params.WORKING_DIRECTORY}"
                    echo "Shell Type: ${params.SHELL_TYPE}"
                    echo "Skip Build: ${params.SKIP_BUILD}"
                    echo "Skip Test: ${params.SKIP_TEST}"
                    echo "Skip Deployment: ${params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT}"
                    echo "=============================="
                    
                    if (params.ENVIRONMENT_VARS) {
                        def envVars = params.ENVIRONMENT_VARS.split(',')
                        envVars.each { envVar ->
                            def parts = envVar.split('=')
                            if (parts.size() == 2) {
                                env."${parts[0].trim()}" = parts[1].trim()
                                echo "Set environment variable: ${parts[0].trim()}"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Pre-Build Scripts') {
            when {
                expression { params.PRE_BUILD_SCRIPTS && !params.SKIP_BUILD }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executeScripts(params.PRE_BUILD_SCRIPTS, 'Pre-Build', params.WORKING_DIRECTORY)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Build') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_BUILD }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    timeout(time: params.BUILD_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES') {
                        dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                            try {
                                echo "=== Executing Build Command ==="
                                executeCommand(params.BUILD_COMMAND, 'Build')
                            } catch (Exception e) {
                                if (params.CONTINUE_ON_BUILD_FAILURE) {
                                    echo "Build failed but continuing pipeline: ${e.message}"
                                    currentBuild.result = 'UNSTABLE'
                                } else {
                                    throw e
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Post-Build Scripts') {
            when {
                expression { params.POST_BUILD_SCRIPTS && !params.SKIP_BUILD }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executeScripts(params.POST_BUILD_SCRIPTS, 'Post-Build', params.WORKING_DIRECTORY)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Pre-Test Scripts') {
            when {
                expression { params.PRE_TEST_SCRIPTS && !params.SKIP_TEST }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executeScripts(params.PRE_TEST_SCRIPTS, 'Pre-Test', params.WORKING_DIRECTORY)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_TEST }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    timeout(time: params.TEST_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES') {
                        dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                            try {
                                echo "=== Executing Test Command ==="
                                executeCommand(params.TEST_COMMAND, 'Test')
                            } catch (Exception e) {
                                if (params.CONTINUE_ON_TEST_FAILURE) {
                                    echo "Tests failed but continuing pipeline: ${e.message}"
                                    currentBuild.result = 'UNSTABLE'
                                } else {
                                    throw e
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Post-Test Scripts') {
            when {
                expression { params.POST_TEST_SCRIPTS && !params.SKIP_TEST }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executeScripts(params.POST_TEST_SCRIPTS, 'Post-Test', params.WORKING_DIRECTORY)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Custom Stage 1') {
            when {
                expression { params.CUSTOM_STAGE_1_NAME && params.CUSTOM_STAGE_1_COMMANDS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Executing Custom Stage: ${params.CUSTOM_STAGE_1_NAME} ==="
                    executeScripts(params.CUSTOM_STAGE_1_COMMANDS, params.CUSTOM_STAGE_1_NAME, params.WORKING_DIRECTORY)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Custom Stage 2') {
            when {
                expression { params.CUSTOM_STAGE_2_NAME && params.CUSTOM_STAGE_2_COMMANDS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Executing Custom Stage: ${params.CUSTOM_STAGE_2_NAME} ==="
                    executeScripts(params.CUSTOM_STAGE_2_COMMANDS, params.CUSTOM_STAGE_2_NAME, params.WORKING_DIRECTORY)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Custom Stage 3') {
            when {
                expression { params.CUSTOM_STAGE_3_NAME && params.CUSTOM_STAGE_3_COMMANDS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Executing Custom Stage: ${params.CUSTOM_STAGE_3_NAME} ==="
                    executeScripts(params.CUSTOM_STAGE_3_COMMANDS, params.CUSTOM_STAGE_3_NAME, params.WORKING_DIRECTORY)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Pre-Deployment Scripts') {
            when {
                expression { params.PRE_DEPLOYMENT_SCRIPTS && !params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executeScripts(params.PRE_DEPLOYMENT_SCRIPTS, 'Pre-Deployment', params.WORKING_DIRECTORY)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deployment') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    timeout(time: params.DEPLOYMENT_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES') {
                        dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                            echo "=== Executing Deployment Command ==="
                            executeCommand(params.DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND, 'Deployment')
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Post-Deployment Scripts') {
            when {
                expression { params.POST_DEPLOYMENT_SCRIPTS && !params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executeScripts(params.POST_DEPLOYMENT_SCRIPTS, 'Post-Deployment', params.WORKING_DIRECTORY)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Archive Artifacts') {
            when {
                expression { params.ARTIFACT_PATHS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifacts = params.ARTIFACT_PATHS.split(',')
                    artifacts.each { artifact ->
                        def trimmedArtifact = artifact.trim()
                        if (trimmedArtifact) {
                            try {
                                echo "Archiving: ${trimmedArtifact}"
                                archiveArtifacts artifacts: trimmedArtifact, allowEmptyArchive: true
                            } catch (Exception e) {
                                echo "Failed to archive ${trimmedArtifact}: ${e.message}"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        always {
            script {
                echo "=== Pipeline Execution Summary ==="
                echo "Result: ${currentBuild.result ?: 'SUCCESS'}"
                echo "Duration: ${currentBuild.durationString}"
                echo "=============================="
                
                if (params.CLEANUP_WORKSPACE) {
                    echo "Cleaning workspace..."
                    cleanWs()
                }
                
                if (params.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL) {
                    try {
                        emailext(
                            to: params.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL,
                            subject: "Jenkins Build ${currentBuild.result ?: 'SUCCESS'}: ${env.JOB_NAME} #${env.BUILD_NUMBER}",
                            body: """
                                Build: ${env.JOB_NAME} #${env.BUILD_NUMBER}
                                Status: ${currentBuild.result ?: 'SUCCESS'}
                                Duration: ${currentBuild.durationString}
                                
                                Console Output: ${env.BUILD_URL}console
                            """,
                            mimeType: 'text/plain'
                        )
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        echo "Failed to send email notification: ${e.message}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        success {
            echo "Pipeline completed successfully!"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline failed!"
        }
        unstable {
            echo "Pipeline completed with warnings!"
        }
    }
}

def executeCommand(String command, String stageName) {
    if (params.VERBOSE_OUTPUT) {
        echo "Executing command: ${command}"
    }
    
    def shellCmd = """
        set -e
        ${params.VERBOSE_OUTPUT ? 'set -x' : ''}
        ${command}
    """
    
    if (isUnix()) {
        sh(script: shellCmd, label: stageName)
    } else {
        bat(script: command, label: stageName)
    }
}

def executeScripts(String scripts, String stageName, String workDir) {
    if (!scripts || scripts.trim().isEmpty()) {
        return
    }
    
    def scriptLines = scripts.split('\n').findAll { it.trim() }
    
    scriptLines.eachWithIndex { script, index ->
        def trimmedScript = script.trim()
        if (trimmedScript && !trimmedScript.startsWith('#')) {
            dir(workDir) {
                echo "--- ${stageName} Script ${index + 1} ---"
                executeCommand(trimmedScript, "${stageName} - Script ${index + 1}")
            }
        }
    }
}
